scope: BEAI Package for OpenClaw Telegram direct conversations
required_evidence: generated response records source_message_id, chat_id, content_hash, generated_at, and delivery_status
reply_payload_sending observed as candidate only, not completion
message(action=send) called for the source conversation or normal source delivery reached message_sent
Telegram message_sent success true with messageId returned
generated/send_attempted response without Telegram messageId remains unverified
Gateway restart recovery scans recent generated/send_attempted responses without messageId
recovery resend uses chat_id + source_message_id + content_hash as an idempotency key
Telegram-driven execution opens a quick first-status contract before deep checks or long tool work
quick first visible status should appear within 30 seconds when a Telegram direct execution turn may take longer than a brief answer
runtime phase timing evidence separates planning, tool, finalize, and delivery segments
long-running Telegram-driven work has periodic visible progress or a recorded progress-gap issue
long-running Telegram visible progress should refresh within 120 seconds while work is still active
non-install BEAI before_agent_reply surfaces in Telegram direct are observer-only and defer to the model
final report visible in the source conversation

ownership.rule: If OpenClaw Telegram transport is healthy but completion was emitted only as internal final_answer/private final, classify primary ownership as BEAI package delivery contract.
